name: ZegoCloud
description: ZegoCloud — real-time voice, video, and live streaming PaaS

seo.title: ZegoCloud — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: ZegoCloud: ZegoCloud — real-time voice, video, and live streaming PaaS

when_to_use: Real-time voice, video, and live streaming PaaS for apps
Group video calls with AI noise suppression via ZEGOCLOUD SDK
Live interactive streaming for 100K+ concurrent viewers
In-app social audio like Clubhouse via ZEGOCLOUD Voice APIs
WebRTC-based video SDK for Chinese and global consumer apps

pros: Mature PaaS for voice, video and live streaming
Strong performance in Asia and emerging markets
cons: DX and docs less polished than top-tier Western vendors
Some features tied to specific regions
review.verdict: Good value real-time media PaaS, especially outside North America; weigh support and DX quality carefully.
review.best_for: Global consumer apps needing cost-effective RTC infra
review.not_for: Enterprise teams prioritizing US-style support SLAs
